filename: Practical things to consider during tCycIF experiments-11.3.2026 SS.docx
relative_path: tCycIF projects/Instructions/Practical things to consider during tCycIF experiments-11.3.2026 SS.docx
full_text:
A complete list

In wet lab setting

Preparing buffer /reagents with wrong solvent.

Not completely dewaxing your slides.

Sticking sticker on top of wet slides.

Using undiluted buffers while performing experiments.

Bleaching the slides with coverslip intact.

Bleaching with the weakest lumen.

Preparing bleaching solution with wrong composition.

Forgetting to store hydrogen peroxide in the fridge.

Keeping NaOH in the fridge.

Using the same pipette tip to pipette different buffers/reagents/antibodies.

Storing antibodies in the wrong temperature : Eg: accidentally keeping +4 antibodies in the freezer and vice versa.

Not filling the antigen retrieval chamber with MQ water.

Diluting 1L of 10X PBS with 900 ml of MQ water instead of 9L of MQ water.

Not labelling things properly or not labelling at all.

Letting slides dry at any stage.

Wiping the sample instead of glass

While taking images with lola :

Keeping Lola’s door open o/n.

Not changing binning settings to 2 in imager.

Taking images with wrong assay.

Misnaming the images while copying and pasting.

Slide not properly rested on the slides holder.

Trying to find the section with slides in opposite orientation.

Coverslipping with 2 coverslips instead of 1.
